empty.description: Generate a new schedule to get started

generate.dialogDescription: Select a strategy for generating the schedule

deleteDialog.title: Are you sure?
deleteDialog.description: Schedule "{{name}}" will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

errors.solverBusy: Another schedule generation is already in progress

constraints.pageSubtitle: Configure optimization preferences for timetable generation

avoidTeacherGaps.label: Avoid Teacher Gaps
avoidTeacherGaps.description: Minimize free periods between teacher's classes
avoidTeacherGaps.tooltip: When enabled, the system tries to schedule teacher's classes consecutively so they have fewer idle periods during the day. This allows teachers to finish their work earlier.

balanceTeacherLoad.label: Balance Teacher Load
balanceTeacherLoad.description: Distribute teaching hours evenly across days
balanceTeacherLoad.tooltip: The system tries to distribute each teacher's teaching hours equally across the week. For example, if a teacher has 12 hours per week, they would have 2 hours per day instead of 6 hours on one day.

respectTeacherTimePreference.label: Respect Teacher Time Preference
respectTeacherTimePreference.tooltip: If a teacher has specified a morning or afternoon preference, the system will try to schedule their classes during that time slot. This helps improve teacher satisfaction.

respectTeacherRoomPreference.label: Respect Teacher Room Preference
respectTeacherRoomPreference.tooltip: If a teacher has specified preferred rooms, the system will try to schedule their classes in those rooms. Useful for teachers who need specific equipment.

avoidClassGaps.label: Avoid Class Gaps
avoidClassGaps.tooltip: The system tries to schedule classes without gaps between periods. This reduces student waiting time and makes the school day more compact.

distributeDifficultSubjects.label: Distribute Difficult Subjects
distributeDifficultSubjects.description: Spread hard subjects across the week
distributeDifficultSubjects.tooltip: Difficult subjects (like Math and Physics) are distributed across different days of the week so students don't have multiple hard subjects on the same day. This helps improve learning outcomes.

preferMorningForDifficult.label: Morning for Difficult Subjects
preferMorningForDifficult.description: Schedule hard subjects in early periods
preferMorningForDifficult.tooltip: Difficult subjects are scheduled in the early periods of the day when student concentration is highest. Easier subjects are placed in later periods.

subjectSpread.label: Subject Spread Across Week
subjectSpread.description: Distribute subject hours across different days
subjectSpread.tooltip: If a subject has 4 hours per week, the system tries to spread them across 4 different days instead of 2 days with 2 hours each. This helps reinforce learning.

allowConsecutivePeriods.label: Allow Consecutive Periods
allowConsecutivePeriods.description: Allow same subject in back-to-back periods
allowConsecutivePeriods.tooltip: When enabled, a subject can be scheduled in two consecutive periods (e.g., Math in periods 1 and 2). Useful for subjects that need more time like lab sessions.

minimizeRoomChanges.label: Minimize Room Changes
minimizeRoomChanges.description: Keep classes in the same room when possible
minimizeRoomChanges.tooltip: The system tries to keep each class in a fixed room and minimize room changes. This reduces transition time and improves order.

notifications.cancelFailed: The generation could not be cancelled

license.trialExpired: The trial has ended. Activate a license to generate timetables.
license.expired: Your license has expired. Renew it to generate timetables.
license.required: An active license is required to generate timetables.

UNKNOWN_ERROR.title: Something prevented generation
UNKNOWN_ERROR.description: Review the items below. If the problem continues, share the reference ID with support.

UNKNOWN_WARNING.title: The timetable needs review
UNKNOWN_WARNING.description: The timetable was saved, but this item may affect its quality.

CLIENT_NETWORK_ERROR.title: The app could not reach the service
CLIENT_NETWORK_ERROR.description: Check that the application service is running, then try again.

CLIENT_PROTOCOL_ERROR.title: The service returned an unsupported response
CLIENT_PROTOCOL_ERROR.description: Restart the application and try again. Share the reference ID if it continues.

VALIDATION_ERROR.title: Some request information is invalid
VALIDATION_ERROR.description: Review the highlighted fields, correct them, and generate again.

LICENSE_EXPIRED.title: Your license has expired
LICENSE_EXPIRED.description: Renew the license before generating a new timetable.

TRIAL_EXPIRED.title: The trial has ended
TRIAL_EXPIRED.description: Activate a license before generating a new timetable.

ASSIGNMENT_READINESS_FAILED.title: Teacher assignments are not ready
ASSIGNMENT_READINESS_FAILED.description: Review and complete the affected teacher, class, and subject assignments before generating.

ASSIGNMENT_NOT_LOCKED.title: Teacher assignments are not ready
ASSIGNMENT_NOT_LOCKED.description: Complete and confirm teacher assignments before generating the timetable.

ASSIGNMENT_PERIOD_MISMATCH.title: Assigned periods do not match the class requirement
ASSIGNMENT_PERIOD_MISMATCH.description: Adjust the assignment so the teacher's periods equal the required periods for this subject.

TEACHER_SUBJECT_CAPABILITY_MISSING.title: An assigned teacher is not linked to this subject
TEACHER_SUBJECT_CAPABILITY_MISSING.description: Add the subject to the teacher's capabilities or choose a qualified teacher.

CLASS_GRADE_INVALID.title: A class has an invalid grade
CLASS_GRADE_INVALID.description: Open the class and select a valid grade before generating again.

CLASS_TEACHER_MISSING.title: A class is missing its class teacher
CLASS_TEACHER_MISSING.description: Assign a class teacher, then generate again.

PRIMARY_CLASS_TEACHER_MISMATCH.title: The primary class teacher assignment does not match
PRIMARY_CLASS_TEACHER_MISMATCH.description: Review the class teacher and subject assignments for this primary class.

CLASS_TEACHER_NOT_ASSIGNED.title: The class teacher has no teaching assignment
CLASS_TEACHER_NOT_ASSIGNED.description: Assign at least one appropriate subject to the class teacher.

NO_TEACHERS.title: No teachers are available
NO_TEACHERS.description: Add at least one teacher and assign subjects before generating.

NO_CLASSES.title: No classes are available
NO_CLASSES.description: Add at least one class before generating.

NO_SUBJECTS.title: No subjects are available
NO_SUBJECTS.description: Add subjects and their weekly period requirements before generating.

NO_ROOMS.title: No rooms are available
NO_ROOMS.description: Add at least one suitable room before generating.

NO_VALID_RESOURCES.title: A lesson has no usable teacher or room
NO_VALID_RESOURCES.description: Review the lesson's teacher assignment, availability, and required room type.

NO_QUALIFIED_TEACHER.title: A subject has no qualified teacher
NO_QUALIFIED_TEACHER.description: Assign a qualified teacher to the affected subject and class.

TEACHER_OVERLOAD.title: A teacher has more lessons than available time
TEACHER_OVERLOAD.description: Reduce this teacher's assigned periods, expand availability, or reassign some lessons.

TEACHER_OVERLOAD_PREDICTED.title: A teacher may be overloaded
TEACHER_OVERLOAD_PREDICTED.description: Review the teacher's workload and availability before generating again.

TEACHER_AVAILABILITY_CONFLICT.title: Teacher availability conflicts with assigned lessons
TEACHER_AVAILABILITY_CONFLICT.description: Expand the teacher's availability or move some assignments to another teacher.

CLASS_PERIOD_SHORTAGE.title: A class does not have enough available periods
CLASS_PERIOD_SHORTAGE.description: Increase the class's available periods or reduce its weekly subject requirements.

EMPTY_PERIODS_ERROR.title: A class has unassigned weekly periods
EMPTY_PERIODS_ERROR.description: Add or increase subject requirements until the class's weekly periods are filled.

OVER_ALLOCATION_ERROR.title: A class requires too many weekly periods
OVER_ALLOCATION_ERROR.description: Reduce subject requirements so they fit within the class's weekly schedule.

MISSING_ROOM_TYPE.title: A required room type is missing
MISSING_ROOM_TYPE.description: Add a room of the required type or change the subject's room requirement.

FIXED_ROOM_INCOMPATIBLE.title: A class's fixed room is not suitable
FIXED_ROOM_INCOMPATIBLE.description: Choose a compatible fixed room or change the subject's required room type.

ROOM_CONFLICT.title: A room is assigned to overlapping lessons
ROOM_CONFLICT.description: Review the affected room and move one of the conflicting lessons.

ROOM_CAPACITY_WARNING.title: A room may be too small
ROOM_CAPACITY_WARNING.description: Review room capacity for the affected class.

SUBJECT_DISTRIBUTION_WARNING.title: A subject could not be spread ideally
SUBJECT_DISTRIBUTION_WARNING.description: The timetable was saved, but this subject is less evenly distributed across the week.

SUBJECT_CONSECUTIVE_WARNING.title: A subject has consecutive periods
SUBJECT_CONSECUTIVE_WARNING.description: The timetable was saved with this subject scheduled in consecutive periods.

SUBJECT_DAILY_LIMIT_INFEASIBLE.title: A subject exceeds its daily distribution target
SUBJECT_DAILY_LIMIT_INFEASIBLE.description: Increase allowed daily periods or reduce the weekly requirement.

TOTAL_PERIODS_MISMATCH.title: Weekly periods do not match the school configuration
TOTAL_PERIODS_MISMATCH.description: Review school period settings and class subject requirements.

PERIOD_CONFIG_MISSING_DAY.title: A school day has no period configuration
PERIOD_CONFIG_MISSING_DAY.description: Configure periods for every active school day.

PERIOD_CONFIG_OUT_OF_RANGE.title: A period is outside the allowed school day
PERIOD_CONFIG_OUT_OF_RANGE.description: Correct the school period settings before generating again.

INVALID_CATEGORY.title: A grade or class category is invalid
INVALID_CATEGORY.description: Review the school grade categories and class settings before generating again.

NO_FEASIBLE_SOLUTION.title: The current requirements cannot all fit
NO_FEASIBLE_SOLUTION.description: Start with the affected teachers and classes, relax conflicting constraints, then generate again.

INVALID_GENERATED_PERIOD_BOUNDS.title: The generated timetable used an invalid period
INVALID_GENERATED_PERIOD_BOUNDS.description: Review school day and class period settings, then generate again.

INVALID_GENERATED_TIMETABLE.title: The generated timetable failed a safety check
INVALID_GENERATED_TIMETABLE.description: Try again. If it repeats, share the reference ID with support.

SOLVER_BUSY.title: A timetable is already being generated
SOLVER_BUSY.description: Wait for the current generation to finish or cancel it before starting another.

SOLVER_CANCELLED.title: Timetable generation was cancelled
SOLVER_CANCELLED.description: No new timetable was saved. You can generate again when ready.

SOLVER_TIMEOUT.title: Generation took longer than allowed
SOLVER_TIMEOUT.description: Try again or use a faster strategy. Review complex constraints if it repeats.

NO_CANCELLABLE_GENERATION.title: There is no generation to cancel
NO_CANCELLABLE_GENERATION.description: The current generation has already finished or is no longer cancellable.

ANALYSIS_ERROR.title: The readiness check could not finish
ANALYSIS_ERROR.description: Try again. Share the reference ID with support if it continues.

SOLVER_PROTOCOL_ERROR.title: The solver returned an unsupported result
SOLVER_PROTOCOL_ERROR.description: Restart the application and try again. Share the reference ID if it continues.

SOLVER_PARSE_ERROR.title: The solver result could not be read
SOLVER_PARSE_ERROR.description: Restart the application and try again. Share the reference ID if it continues.

SOLVER_NOT_FOUND.title: The timetable solver is unavailable
SOLVER_NOT_FOUND.description: Restart the application. If this continues, repair or reinstall the application.

SOLVER_SPAWN_ERROR.title: The timetable solver could not start
SOLVER_SPAWN_ERROR.description: Restart the application and try again. Share the reference ID if it continues.

SOLVER_RUNTIME_ERROR.title: The timetable solver stopped unexpectedly
SOLVER_RUNTIME_ERROR.description: Try again. If it repeats, share the reference ID with support.

SOLVER_EMPTY_OUTPUT.title: The timetable solver returned no result
SOLVER_EMPTY_OUTPUT.description: Try again. If it repeats, share the reference ID with support.

INVALID_JSON_INPUT.title: The solver received invalid timetable data
INVALID_JSON_INPUT.description: Review school configuration and assignments, then try again.

SOLVER_STATUS_ERROR.title: Generation status is unavailable
SOLVER_STATUS_ERROR.description: Wait a moment and try again.

SOLVER_CANCEL_ERROR.title: The cancellation request failed
SOLVER_CANCEL_ERROR.description: Wait for the status to refresh, then try cancelling again.

TRANSFORMATION_ERROR.title: School data could not be prepared
TRANSFORMATION_ERROR.description: Review the affected records or share the reference ID with support.

SCHOOL_CONFIG_CORRUPT.title: School configuration data is damaged
SCHOOL_CONFIG_CORRUPT.description: Open school settings and correct the configuration before generating again.

TIMETABLE_SAVE_ERROR.title: The timetable was generated but could not be saved
TIMETABLE_SAVE_ERROR.description: Try again. If the problem continues, share the reference ID with support.

INTERNAL_ERROR.title: The application could not complete generation
INTERNAL_ERROR.description: Try again. If the problem continues, share the reference ID with support.

SOLVER_ERROR.title: The solver could not complete generation
SOLVER_ERROR.description: Try again. If the problem continues, share the reference ID with support.
